finding: crates/fj-py/src/lib.rs raised PyNotImplementedError for integer Array.round(decimals < 0)
change: Implemented checked integer negative-decimal rounding for signed and unsigned literals with ties-to-even behavior.

behavior_proof.ordering: Element iteration order is unchanged; tensor shape is reused unchanged.
behavior_proof.tie_breaking: Halfway cases round by quotient ties-to-even: 15 -> 20, 25 -> 20, -15 -> -20, -25 -> -20.
behavior_proof.rng: No RNG is used or introduced.
behavior_proof.dtype: Input integer dtype is preserved; out-of-range rounded values fail closed with PyOverflowError.

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-py-check-ot03 cargo check -p fj-py --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-py-test-ot03 cargo test -p fj-py value_ -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-py-clippy-ot03 cargo clippy -p fj-py --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

validation.notes: No critical findings; broad pre-existing warning inventory remains in this large file.
